user_system_path: The Master Bible is reference authority and issue #194 is the active first money-loop seam. ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml must point at the same issue and the queue file must remain inactive/reference-only.
no_routing_contract: The Agent is forbidden from asking 'What is next?' or 'Should we audit this?'. allowed_files_raw: Current seam is the first money-loop implementation seam: keep the Master Bible reference-only, point the repo at issue #194, and align source-truth, gate/test files, runtime brain modules, and fixtures without widening to product breadth.
forbidden_files_raw: No live Slack, no Supabase migrations or data mutation, no Vercel settings, no Stripe/auth/dashboard work, no package/dependency changes, no queue activation, no Dependabot, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup outside the verdict loop.

stop_condition: Stop when the source-truth closeout and gate/test layer both accept issue #194 as active with no queue activation.
